messages.content: Refactor the authentication module to use JWT.
I'll refactor the auth module to use JWT. I'll replace session-based auth with stateless JWT tokens, update the middleware, and add token refresh logic.
Make sure to handle token expiry gracefully.
Done. The middleware now catches TokenExpiredError and returns a 401 with a `WWW-Authenticate: Bearer error="token_expired"` header, prompting the client to refresh.
